notes: PARK AT WEST ALIANA TRACE -- zip 77407 (Richmond/unincorporated Fort Bend County). Search results confirm a $62M, 294-unit multifamily apartment project at West Aliana Trace Drive and Fairbairn Way in the Grand at Aliana area. The development includes 11 two- and three-story residential buildings plus clubhouse, designed by Humphreys & Partners of Dallas. Specific developer/owner for this permit record not confirmed by name but the multifamily project at this address is well documented.
